name: 0th-skills
description: Lightweight development workflow for solo builders with host-native skills, subagents, deep research, and cross-model review.

interface.shortDescription: A lightweight build and research workflow for solo builders
interface.longDescription: Use 0th to turn ideas into decisions, break work into slices, build with TDD, debug from root cause, run source-aware research, and drive deeper feasibility loops before shipping. Includes host-native Codex subagents, cross-model review bridges, and metadata tuned for both Codex and Claude Code.
defaultPrompt: Turn an idea into a short decision record.
Implement this change with TDD on a feature branch.
Debug this from root cause before fixing it.
